title: Land Use Planning (Village Land Use Plans) Notice, 2013
title_en: Land Use Planning (Village Land Use Plans) Notice, 2013

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Land Use Planning (Village Land Use Plans) Notice, 2013.

provisions.title: Decla­ration of village land use plans
provisions.content: The area described in the Schedule hereto are hereby declared to have Village Land Use Plans. Schedule S/N Region District Village Name 1. Lindi Kilwa Mtandi 1 2. Lindi Kilwa Rushungi 1 GRAND TOTAL 2 History of this document 06 September 2013 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania Commenced 07 August 2013 Assented to Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
